summary: Frontend-only testing of the editorial Maths Financières BTS React magazine app. All 4 chapters render, all 4 calculators produce mathematically correct results, quiz/flashcards/sliders/frequency buttons all interactive. No console errors. Mobile responsive layout collapses correctly.

issues: Cover illustration shows repeated 'QUANTUM' wordmark and fake journal title 'The Journal of Advanced Financial Models SUMMER 2024' with garbled author names 'BAMNICIT MANGAGIH HANDER' — feels slightly AI-generated and doesn't match the French BTS theme of the magazine. Consider replacing with a cleaner editorial illustration referencing intérêts/finance in French.

action_items: Optional: replace cover image with a cleaner French-themed editorial illustration to reduce 'AI slop' feel (user explicitly requested less AI-slop look).
critical_code_review_comments: All components use data-testid attributes properly (cover-section, nav-link-chX, toc-link-chX, calculator-chX, result-chX, slider-*-chX, freq-chX-*, quiz-chX-qX-cX, quiz-submit-chX, quiz-reset-chX, flashcard-flip-chX, flashcard-prev/next/toggle-chX, scroll-progress, top-nav).

Calculator math verified correct: ch1 (simple) default 5000€ @4% x10y = 7 000€ final / 2 000€ interest. ch2 (compound) = 7 401€. ch3 proportional 4%/4 = 1.0000%. ch4 equivalent (1.04)^(1/12)-1 = 0.3274%. All match spec.
Calculator.jsx returns undefined if mode doesn't match any branch — minor code smell; useMemo has implicit undefined fallback. Not a runtime bug since 4 valid modes are always passed.
Nav.jsx IntersectionObserver only sets active when entering view; if user is between sections the active state may stay stale. Acceptable for editorial scroll experience.
BrowserRouter is used but only one Magazine route exists — slight overhead but harmless.
Frontend env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is correctly configured but unused in code (pure frontend app, as expected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend React magazine app at https://interactive-cards-23.preview.emergentagent.com/. Verified: cover section, sticky nav (4 chapter links + scroll progress), TOC navigation, all 4 chapter sections rendering with calculator/quiz/flashcards, calculator math (linear ch1=7000€, exponential ch2=7401€, proportional ch3=0.3333%/1.0000% on freq=4, equivalent ch4=0.3274%), slider live updates, frequency buttons, quiz submit/reset, flashcards next/prev, mobile responsive layout, zero console errors. data-testid coverage is complete.
